transcript: Speaker A (Farmer): I am feeling pain in my chest when I breathe. Because of this, I am not able to sleep properly. Speaker B (Doctor): अरे! आपकी इंग्लिश तो बहुत अच्छी है! कोई कोर्स किया है क्या? [Wow! Your English is very good! Have you done any course?] Speaker A: कोर्स करने के लिए पैसा भी चाहिए और पढ़ाई भी चाहिए। मैं तो सिर्फ पांचवी पास हूँ। [To do a course, you need money and education. I am only 5th pass.] Speaker B: तो फिर इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे बोल लेते हो? [Then how do you speak such good English?] Speaker A: MySivi ऐप सर। इसमें जो AI टीचर है, उसने मेरे जैसे अनपढ़ आदमी को भी इंग्लिश बोलना सिखा दिया, वो भी सिर्फ 30 डेज में! रोज़ बस 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो, बस। कोई ऐड्स का झंझट नहीं, बहुत आसानी से सीख सकते हो। [MySivi app, sir. The AI teacher in this taught an illiterate man like me to speak English, that too in just 30 days! Just practice 10-15 minutes daily, that's it. No hassle of ads, you can learn very easily.] Speaker B: नाइस एक्चुअली! मुझे भी एक अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलने वाली रिसेप्शनिस्ट चाहिए। [Nice actually! I also need a receptionist who speaks good English.] Speaker A: बगल में छोरा और शहर में ढिंढोरा! मैं तो हूँ ना। [The boy is next to you and you're searching the whole city! I am here, right?] Speaker B: Then come from tomorrow! Speaker A: Thank you so much sir. इस इंग्लिश की वजह से मेरी जिंदगी ही बदल गई! आप भी अपनी जिंदगी बदलना चाहते हो तो तुरंत MySivi डाउनलोड करो। सिर्फ 10-15 डेज में फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलना सीख जाओ। [Thank you so much, sir. Because of this English, my life has changed! If you also want to change your life, download MySivi immediately. Learn to speak fluent English in just 10-15 days.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Download MySivi app now.
on_screen_text: I am feeling pain in my chest when I breathe. Because of this, I am not able to sleep properly. Aapki English toh bahut acchi hai! Koi course kiya hai kya? Course karne ke liye paisa bhi chahiye aur padhai bhi chahiye. Main toh sirf paanchvi pass hoon. Toh phir itni acchi English kaise bol lete ho? MySivi. Isme jo AI Teacher hai, usne mere jaise anpadh aadmi ko bhi English bolna sikha diya. Woh bhi sirf 30 days in! Roz bas 10-15 minute practice karo, bas. Koi ads ka jhanjhat nahi, bahut aasani se seekh sakte ho. Nice actually! Mujhe bhi ek acchi English bolne wali receptionist chahiye. Bagal mein chora aur seher mein dhindhora. Main toh hoon na. Then come from tomorrow! Thank you so much sir. Is English ki wajah se meri zindagi hi badal gayi! Aap bhi apni zindagi badalna chahte ho toh turant MySivi. Farratedar English. MySivi AI English Speaking App. Install Now.
summary: An elderly farmer surprises a doctor by speaking fluent English, explaining he learned it in 30 days using the MySivi app's AI teacher. Impressed, the doctor hires him as a receptionist, demonstrating how the app can change lives. The ad ends with a call to action to download MySivi.
